originalTitle: Italy made me a manager when England 'discouraged' me - Cole
originalDescription: Ashley Cole won 107 caps for England, seventh on the all‑time list, but says he was "discouraged" by those in the football pyramid from becoming a head coach.

originalTitle: Nobody says who called first, but Arteta and Guardiola speak again - Balague
originalDescription: As Manchester City prepare to host Arsenal in Sunday's crucial Premier League meeting between the top two, European football expert Guillem Balague looks at how the two managers have evolved.

originalTitle: Champions League in the Championship? Forest's juggling act goes on
originalDescription: Nottingham Forest continue their remarkable Europa League run - but does it only increase the pressure on staying in the Premier League?

originalTitle: Fernandez back to face Man Utd but Chelsea's problems remain

originalTitle: Sutton's predictions v boxer Molly McCann & the Boo Radleys
originalDescription: Chris Sutton takes on boxer Molly McCann and The Boo Radley's frontman Sice Rowbottom plus the BBC readers and AI with his predictions for this weekend's Premier League fixtures.

originalTitle: Spectacular European nights the new normal for Villa under Emery
originalDescription: Ten years ago, Aston Villa were relegated to English football's second tier for the first time since 1987. Now they are in their second European semi-final in three seasons.

originalTitle: Why 'sensational' Palace & Conference League are good fit
originalDescription: After overcoming Fiorentina over two legs to reach the semi-finals, Crystal Palace will now fancy their chances of going all the way in the Conference League and adding a European trophy to their FA Cup success last season.

originalDescription: Forty-one teams have been promoted into the Premier League, can you name them all?

originalTitle: 'This isn't a case of giving up' - Norris reveals McLaren's title game plan
originalDescription: Lando Norris believes McLaren can still "push hard" to defend their world titles when the F1 season resumes from the Miami Grand Prix, despite Mercedes and Ferrari's superior starts to the sport's new era.

originalTitle: Palace defy Fiorentina comeback to reach Conference League semi finals
originalDescription: Crystal Palace booked their place in the Conference League semi-finals with a 4-2 aggregate victory over Fiorentina despite losing the second leg 2-1 in Florence.

originalTitle: Åberg leads RBC Heritage as MacIntyre makes strong start after Masters drama
